scenarios.label: Research acceptance workflow
scenarios.objective: Turn a public-safe research acceptance workflow into a reusable proof-carrying capability.

scenarios.label: Software delivery pattern
scenarios.objective: Promote a proof-backed software delivery review pattern only after tests, baselines, rollback, and challenge windows clear.

scenarios.label: Verifier policy update
scenarios.objective: Evaluate whether a verifier policy may influence future missions without admitting false proof or privacy leakage.

scenarios.label: Evidence Docket template
scenarios.objective: Convert a useful Evidence Docket template into an immutable, replayable, rollbackable reusable artifact.
